title: lachnagrostis distans
intro: Lachnagrostis distans, also known as blue oat grass, is a perennial grass species native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating respiratory issues. Lachnagrostis distans can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
